data.name: AlreadyInUseException
data.value: Already InUse !

data.name: CostProfileHasActivePosException
data.value: Cost Profile Has Active Pos!

data.name: DailyLimitAmountExceeded
data.value: Daily Limit Amount Exceeded!

data.name: DailyLimitCountExceeded
data.value: Daily Limit Count Exceeded!

data.name: InvalidInstallmentException
data.value: Invalid Installment!

data.name: MerchantBusinessPartnerMaxCountException
data.value: Merchant Business Max Count

data.name: MonthlyLimitAmountExceeded
data.value: Monthly Limit Amount Exceeded!

data.name: MonthlyLimitCountExceeded
data.value: Monthly Limit Count Exceeded!

data.name: UserInBlacklistException
data.value: We cannot process your request right now. For information, please send an e-mail to @@informationMail.

data.name: DuplicateRecordException
data.value: Duplicate Record Exists!

data.name: InvalidActivationDateException
data.value: Invalid Activation Date!

data.name: DuplicateMerchantLimitException
data.value: Duplicate Merchant Limit!

data.name: MerchantLimitDailyMaxAmountExceededException
data.value: Daily limit cannot be more than monthly limit!

data.name: MerchantLimitMonthlyMaxAmountExceededException
data.value: Monthly limit cannot be less than daily limit!

data.name: IKSGeneralException
data.value: Error occured while doing IKS service operation.

data.name: DailyLimitCountExceededException
data.value: DailyLimitCountExceededException

data.name: DailyLimitAmountExceededException
data.value: DailyLimitAmountExceededException

data.name: MonthlyLimitAmountExceededException
data.value: MonthlyLimitAmountExceededException

data.name: MonthlyLimitCountExceededException
data.value: MonthlyLimitCountExceededException

data.name: CompanyHasAlreadyAnnulmentRecord
data.value: Company Has Already an Annulment Record

data.name: PayingTotalAmountIsLessZeroException
data.value: Paying total amount is less zero!

data.name: PostingUpdateBankNotPaymentWaitingException
data.value: Payment isn't waiting.Don't Update Bank!

data.name: IntegrationModeNotAllowedException
data.value: Integration mode not allowed for this merchant!

data.name: InvalidMerchantStatusException
data.value: Invalid Merchant Status

data.name: TransactionTypeNotValidForDeductionException
data.value: Transaction type is not valid for deduction!

data.name: TransactionCanBeChargebackOrSuspiciousException
data.value: Transaction cannot be chargeback and suspicious at the same time!

data.name: CannotDeleteDefaultDueProfileException
data.value: Cannot delete default due profile!

data.name: DueInUseException
data.value: Due has active merchant!

data.name: DueAlreadyActiveForMerchantException
data.value: Due type already exists for this merchant!

data.name: CannotReturnMerchantHasBlockedAmountException
data.value: Return cannot be made because the merchant has blocked amount.Please unblock amount then return!

data.name: NoReturnPaymentAllowedException
data.value: There is no return authority for this merchant.

data.name: DailyReturnAmountCannotGreaterAuthAmountException
data.value: The daily refund amount cannot be greater than the total transaction amount.

data.name: TransactionNotReturnableException
data.value: Transaction is not returnable.

data.name: InvalidReferenceNumberException
data.value: Invalid transaction information.

data.name: InvalidReturnAmountException
data.value: Invalid return amount.

data.name: VposNotFoundException
data.value: Vpos not found. Please try again later.

data.name: IbanValidationFailedException
data.value: TC ID/Tax ID and IBAN does not match. Please check

data.name: MerchantLimitExceeded
data.value: Merchant Limit Exceeded!

data.name: BankLimitExceededException
data.value: Monthly limit cannot be less than total limit!

data.name: MerchantCommercialTitleNotMatchException
data.value: Invalid commercial title for Tax Number!

data.name: OnUsVposAlreadyActiveException
data.value: There is a vpos that already marked as on-us.

data.name: PricingProfileItemAtLoss
data.value: In order to avoid negative commission, the merchant commission rate must be minimum ({0}) and the number of merchant blocking days must be minimum ({1}).

data.name: MerchantPricingAtLoss
data.value: In order to avoid negative commission, the merchant commission rate must be minimum ({0}) and the number of merchant blocking days must be minimum ({1}).

data.name: CostProfileItemAtLoss
data.value: In order to avoid negative commission, the merchant commission rate must be minimum ({0}) and the number of merchant blocking days must be minimum ({1}).

data.name: IdentityValidationFailedException
data.value: Given Authorized Person Identity Values Are Not Valid. Please Check

data.name: ActiveMerchantWalletRequiredException
data.value: Active merchant wallet required!

data.name: PotentialFraudException
data.value: We are unable to process your transaction at the moment. For information, please send an e-mail to @@informationMail.

data.name: InvalidMerchantStatementTypeException
data.value: Invalid MerchantStatementType. Allowed values are Excel and PDF

data.name: SubMerchantRemoveException
data.value: User to be deactivated is the only active user of the submerchant. The user cannot be deactivated unless the submerchant status is set to passive.

data.name: InvalidMerchantTypeException
data.value: Invalid Merchant Type

data.name: SubMerchantCountException
data.value: Your active sub-dealer count has reached its maximum.

data.name: SubMerchantUserCountException
data.value: You have reached the maximum number of active users that can be created for the sub-dealer.

data.name: ParentMerchantCommissionMustBeZeroException
data.value: Must be zero when ProfileType is Standard.

data.name: InvalidPricingProfileTypeException
data.value: Invalid Pricing Profile Type

data.name: InvalidCommissionRateException
data.value: When ‘Pay to Main Merchant’ is selected, the sum of the commission rates must be 100!

data.name: InvalidMerchantPricingProfileException
data.value: A pricing profile compatible with the "Pay to Main Merchant" selection must be chosen!

data.name: MultipleVposTypeNotAllowed
data.value: When 'On-Us' is selected as the Transaction Type, the POS Type cannot be selected!

data.name: MultipleVposTypeException
data.value: Insurance payments cannot be combined with OnUs (wallet) payments.

data.name: InvalidUpdateIksException
data.value: Iks terminal update failed.

data.name: InvalidPosTypeException
data.value: If the product type is physical, you cannot add a Virtual Pos; if the product type is virtual, you cannot add a Physical Pos!

data.name: InvalidUnacceptableStatusException
data.value: Invalid unacceptable transaction status.

data.name: DuplicateMerchantTransactionException
data.value: Duplicate Merchant Transaction!

data.name: InvalidTransactionTypeException
data.value: Invalid transaction type

data.name: TransactionHasChargebackOrSuspiciousException
data.value: Transaction has chargeback or suspicious.

data.name: ReferenceTransactionPostingCompletedException
data.value: Reference transaction's posting already completed.

data.name: CannotChangePosTypeException
data.value: Product type cannot be changed!

data.name: BatchHasUnacceptableTransactionException
data.value: Batch has unacceptable transaction.

data.name: MerchantTransactionUnavailableException
data.value: Transaction is currently unavailable. Try again later.

data.name: PaymentIsNotAllowedForMerchantException
data.value: Payment is not allowed for merchant!
